name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.5.5: keep_bak opt-in (closes #38) — save_document gains keep_bak: bool arg; when true server renames target → <path>.bak before atomic-rename save (single slot, opt-out by default). v3.5.4: actor refactor (closes #39). v3.5.3: atomic-rename save (closes #36). Built on ooxml-swift 0.13.2.
